creator: marklmi26-fbsd@yahoo.com
text:
(In reply to Mark Millard from comment #6)

I also tried the fetch-snapshot via if_ure involvement test from:

https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=271759

(its comment number 11), but with a snapshot that currently exists:

fetch http://ftp3.freebsd.org/pub/FreeBSD/snapshots/ISO-IMAGES/13.2/FreeBSD-13.2-STABLE-arm-armv7-GENERICSD-20230803-b9da47180fd6-255939.img.xz

It completed just fine: no panic. I'v no clue if both patches
were really required for this to work.
